perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young boy with glasses and black headphones sits at a desk with a professional microphone and a stylized orange-and-blue head prop, singing and gesturing. (2) A woman in a pink and green sweatshirt introduces a music project, with text overlays appearing around her. (3) The scene shifts to a studio environment where three children (two boys, one girl) are seen practicing and recording; one boy sits on the floor while others are at a desk with mics. (4) Close-up shots of the children's faces as they sing, laugh, and interact with the recording equipment. (5) The woman is shown laughing hysterically in a candid, off-camera style shot. (6) A wide shot shows the entire studio setup with lights, cameras, and the three children at the desk.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A boy's high-pitched, energetic voice sings a melody with the lyrics 'Haha baby'. (2) An upbeat, fast-tempo pop BGM starts as a woman narrates in a cheerful, enthusiastic tone. (3) The audio shifts to a mix of children singing, sometimes in harmony and sometimes playfully off-key, interspersed with candid laughter and adult voices giving directions. (4) SFX include occasional celebratory noises and the sound of professional audio monitoring during the recording takes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '2025 驚世巨作準備誕生' (A 2025 masterpiece is about to be born), 'HAHA 主題曲' (HAHA Theme Song), '錄音過程大公開' (Recording process revealed). (2) Decorative/Effect Text: '(認真波)' (Serious mode), '乖學生 v.s 調皮學生' (Good student vs. Naughty student), '親媽無誤!!!' (Definitely the biological mother!!!), and countdown timers for 'cute moments'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Behind-the-scenes montage of recording session -> Comedic outtakes -> Outro

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The adult female wears a casual pink and green sweatshirt; the children are dressed in comfortable casual wear (t-shirts, sweatshirts) suitable for a studio session.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A professional recording studio with sound-absorbing curtains, studio lights (softboxes), multiple microphones, and cameras on tripods.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document and promote the recording of a new theme song for the 'Haha Baby' brand, utilizing the charm and humorous interactions of the creator's children to engage the audience and build brand affinity.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The woman explicitly discusses the 'HAHA 主題曲' and the video features the brand's characters/props.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Tsai family children, 'Haha Baby' head prop.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on family-oriented content and the existing popularity of the creator's children to drive engagement.
